description: Table npc du mod TCP (colonnes documentees via le D2R Data Guide).
source: Colonnes du .txt (mod TCP) ; types/descriptions du D2R Data Guide (guide/).

columns.name: npc
columns.description: Points to the matching "ID" value in the monstats.txt file. This should not be changed

columns.name: buy mult
columns.description: Used to calculate the item's price when it is bought by the NPC from the player. This number is a fraction of 1024 in the following formula: [cost] * [buy mult] / 1024

columns.name: sell mult
columns.description: Used to calculate the item's price when it is sold by the NPC to the player. This number is a fraction of 1024 in the following formula: [cost] * [sell mult] / 1024

columns.name: rep mult
columns.description: Used to calculate the cost to repair an item. This number is a fraction of 1024 in the following formula: [cost] * [rep mult] / 1024. This is then used to influence the repair cost based on the item durability and charges
